ohtani.title: Jordan Walker's four hits propel Cardinals to win
ohtani.blurb: Jordan Walker drives in two with four hits as Nolan Gorman and Alec Burleson each homer in the Cardinals' 7-2 win over the Dodgers

imanaga.title: Ohtani, Wrobleski lead Dodgers to a 6-0 win over Cubs
imanaga.blurb: Shohei Ohtani crushes a home run and Justin Wrobleski tosses six scoreless frames, leading the Dodgers to a 6-0 win over the Cubs\n

suzuki.title: Michael Busch leads Cubs to 6-5 win over D-backs
suzuki.blurb: Michael Busch strikes early with a two-run double to help lead the Cubs to a 6-5 win over the D-backs

yoshida.title: Trey Yesavage goes 5 1/3 scoreless in season debut
yoshida.blurb: Trey Yesavage starts his 2026 season by going 5 1/3 scoreless in a 3-0 win over the Red Sox

okamoto.title: Kazuma Okamoto's two homers powers Blue Jays win
okamoto.blurb: Kazuma Okamoto homers twice and Yohendrick Pinango knocks two RBI singles in the Blue Jays' 7-3 win over the Twins

murakami.title: Murakami, Montgomery go yard in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Munetaka Murakami belts his league-leading 13th home run and Colson Montgomery adds a solo smash to lead the White Sox over the Padres, 8-2
